descriptionHtml:
Vindö 90 for sale 1978 | 2 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

If you are searching for a classic sailing yacht with timeless charm and proven sea capabilities, the Vindö 90 for sale 1978 presents a special opportunity. Built in the legendary Nötesunds Varv in Sweden, this ketch-rigged vessel demonstrates the craftsmanship and thoughtful design for which Vindö yachts are renowned. Having been well cared for, including a comprehensive overhaul in 1994/1995, and an ongoing program of renewal and technical upgrades, she remains in good condition and ready for new adventures.

(Autopilot, Plotter, Radar, Inverter, Solar Panels, Watermaker, Anchors...)

Specifications

  • Model: Vindö 90
  • Year Built: 1978
  • Builder: Nötesunds Varv
  • Length Overall: 12.85 m
  • Beam: 3.95 m
  • Draft: 1.85 m
  • Keel: Long keel with 5 t lead ballast
  • Displacement: Approx. 14 t
  • Hull: Fiberglass
  • Deck: Teak
  • Interior: Mahogany

Deck and Exterior

  • Deep anchor box, large storage compartments
  • Centre cockpit with fixed windscreen and sprayhood
  • Large lazarette, stern pulpit with walk-through
  • Bath platform, ladder, stern shower, stainless steel davits
  • Raymarine windgauge, depth sounder, log
  • Solimar pedestal with Cassens & Plath compass, chartplotter, autopilot

Rig and Sails

  • Selden mainmast and mizzen (mast steps for ease)
  • Fully battened mainsail (35.3m²), Genoa I (42.5m²)
  • Roller furling jib and additional jib for trade wind sailing
  • Mizzen (12.2m²), Parasailor, Spinnaker pole

Engine and Tanks

  • Yanmar 4JH110 engine, 2017, 110hp, approx. 1400 hours
  • 600L diesel across three stainless steel tanks

Interior and Accommodation

  • Owners’ layout, never chartered
  • Staircase with non-slip steps
  • Forward cabin with berths, electric toilet (2023), illuminated wardrobe
  • Spacious saloon with U-shaped settee and opposite settee, convertible to double berth
  • High-quality upholstery (renewed 2019)
  • Pilot berth, navigation station with chart table
  • L-shaped galley: gimbal-mounted gas stove, double sink, two refrigerators
  • Aft cabin: two berths (180x200cm), new mattresses, illuminated wardrobe
  • Aft head: manual toilet, sink, shower
  • Head locker for foul-weather gear, life jackets, lifebelts
  • Engine room with technical equipment

Water and Electrical Systems

  • 600L freshwater tank, hot water boiler
  • 250L blackwater tank
  • 220V shore power, charger, inverter, new electrical installation (Philippi panel)
  • Battery bank: 1x140Ah starter (2022), 4x100Ah AGM (2025)
  • Solar panels

Navigation and Safety Equipment

  • Raymarine electronics: wind, log, depth, radar, chartplotter (C80), AIS, radio, autopilot
  • BfA life raft (servicing required), life jackets, lifebuoy, safety lines
  • Fire extinguisher, fire blanket

Additional Features

  • Bow thruster (2018), Schenker Smart watermaker, windgenerator, diesel heater, Hydrovane windvane steering, full covers, fenders, bimini, aluminium mast (15m), mast steps

This Vindö 90 for sale 1978 has benefitted from attentive owners who have maintained her with care, resulting in a yacht that is ready to sail and in good technical and visual condition. For those valuing tradition, quality, and the capacity for long-distance cruising, she represents a rare opportunity on the market. Contact us now, for more information or to book your viewing!
